markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on product strategy, roadmap, and go-to-market.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Dual-Product Strategy:** Launching two products: CheckNet (competitive intelligence) and Content OS (content creation).](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [**Content OS Launch Plan:** A phased launch targets a Feb 1st milestone for a usable client product, starting with a limited scope (Pages, Opportunities, Assignments) and feature-flagging complex modules.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
  - [**Two-Tiered Service Model:** The platform will support two client modes: "We operate for you" (full service) and "You operate yourself" (co-piloting), each requiring a Solutions Engineer for setup and calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [**Go-to-Market Decision:** The team will decide whether to market Content OS as a standalone product or as an unbranded "GrowthX platform" (like Harvey) to avoid positioning as a direct competitor to internal teams.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

## Topics

### Market Context & Competitor Intel

  - [**Graphite.io Pivot:** Graphite laid off its entire product team to focus on a full-service, human-led model.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
      - [**Significance:** This validates our hybrid approach, as Graphite sunset a powerful client-facing platform to avoid competing with internal teams.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**Client Segmentation:** Two primary client types inform the service model:](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
    1.  [**"Do it for me" (e.g., Lovable):** High budget, low time; trusts us to run the platform.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
    2.  [**"Internal teams" (e.g., Grammarly):** Has internal teams; concerned about job displacement.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)

### Content OS: Strategy & Roadmap

  - [**Service Model:** A two-tiered model addresses the client segments.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
      - [**"We operate for you":** Full-service, team-operated model for clients like Lovable.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
      - [**"You operate yourself":** Co-piloting model for clients with internal teams.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [**Mandatory Onboarding:** Both models require a Solutions Engineer for initial setup and calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
      - [**Tasks:** Custom content types, CMS publishing workflows, and core artifact calibration (company, personas, writing guidelines).](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [**Phased Launch Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
      - [**December:** Launch core features (Pages, Opportunities, Assignments) for *new content only*.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
          - [**Scope Cuts:** Optimization features are out of scope for now. The Workflow/Pipelines module is feature-flagged for full-service clients only.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
          - [**Feature-Flagged:** Knowledge Base and Assistant modules are hidden due to complexity.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
      - [**January:** Focus on workspace setup and user management.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
          - [**Deliverables:** Workspace calibration (artifacts), a basic "client" user role, LLM opportunity imports, and a basic optimization assignment type.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
      - [**February 1st:** Target milestone for a usable client product.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)

### CheckNet: Competitive Intelligence Product

  - [**Launch:** Public index and prompt management to launch in late November/early December.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [**Public Index:** A free, public site with \~25,000 companies and 14 days of data from "evaluation" prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [**Private Area (Paid):**](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
      - [**Prompt Management:** Access to a full library of prompts (Awareness, Comparison, etc.) and the ability to create custom prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
      - [**Customization:** Control over competitor selection and longer data retention periods.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
  - [**Monetization:** Webflow has expressed interest in licensing the data.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### GrowthX Website & Operations

  - [**Ownership:** The site must move from the "raise" domain to our own ownership.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [**Development Speed:** Requires dedicated resources to accelerate development.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [**Proposal:** Renn sent a proposal outlining options for dedicated resources.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Daniel:**](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)
      - [Review Renn's proposal for the GrowthX website.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)
      - [Approve the $2,000 educational stipend request for Kadia.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up with Renn and Marcel to align on the Content OS go-to-market strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/DD1PwyE7GNezruhxCtJtysGFCbNiSbbW?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
